speaker: EXTON
text: Didst thou not mark the King, what words he spake,

speaker: EXTON
text: “Have I no friend will rid me of this living fear?”

speaker: EXTON
text: “Have I no friend?” quoth he. He spake it twice

speaker: EXTON
text: And urged it twice together, did he not?

speaker: EXTON
text: And speaking it, he wishtly looked on me,

speaker: EXTON
text: As who should say “I would thou wert the man

speaker: EXTON
text: That would divorce this terror from my heart”—

speaker: EXTON
text: Meaning the king at Pomfret. Come, let’s go.

speaker: EXTON
text: I am the King’s friend and will rid his foe.
